decisions.rationale: ENUM-03 scope is to centralize and export typed slug-keyed label maps for path_enrollment_status, ai_coaching_mode_os, ai_confidence_level_os, state_energy_level_os, and state_nervous_system_os — not to rewire existing prototype consumers. All three ACs pass (criteria_audit pass, coverage 100%); AC wording ('drives badges', 'exported for selectors', 'available for components') is satisfied by barrel exports in frontend/src/lib/enums/index.ts. OnboardingStateSignals.tsx inline slugs match IR values but onboarding consumer migration is out of ENUM-03 target_files. Downstream PATHS-*, DASH-*, SETTINGS-*, and JOURNAL-* items depend_on ENUM-03 for enum modules existing, not for page-level adoption at implement time — same pattern as ENUM-01 C-1 deferral. Wire consumers in PATHS badge work, dashboard/settings coaching dropdowns, or journal/check-in items.

Bubble value id → slug reverse lookup is satisfied via inline bTI* comments on each slug constant in pathEnrollment.ts, coachingMode.ts, and wellnessState.ts — matching ENUM-01 AC-3 traceability pattern. Exported BY_BUBBLE_ID maps are optional adapter-layer convenience not named in ENUM-03 acceptance criteria; tier.ts uses forward TIER_BUBBLE_IDS (slug → id), not reverse maps. criteria_audit and functional_audit all pass; no downstream depends_on gate requires reverse lookup maps before advance. Add PATH_ENROLLMENT_STATUS_BY_BUBBLE_ID (and siblings) only if Supabase/API payloads carry Bubble option value ids during PATHS-07 or API adapter work.

Reviewer confirms LABELS maps are IR-accurate: lowercase db_value strings where Bubble display equals db_value (path enrollment, coaching mode, energy level) and correct title-case for state_nervous_system_os (Wired, Regulated, Depleted, Shut Down). This differs from onboarding question enums' long descriptive labels by design — those are separate option sets under ENUM-02. No AC requires uniform casing across unrelated option sets; grounding audit passes. Optional DESCRIPTIONS maps for human-facing selector copy belong in downstream UI items if product copy diverges from Bubble display strings.

summary: 0 fix_now, 2 defer, 1 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, functional_ok=true, all ACs pass. Deferred: C-1 consumer wiring (OnboardingStateSignals, PATHS badges, coaching dropdowns — land in PATHS-*, DASH-*, SETTINGS-*, JOURNAL-* implement waves); C-2 optional Bubble id → slug reverse maps (conditional on adapter payloads). Accepted: C-3 label casing is correct per Bubble IR, not a defect.
